title: Cobblemon Better Shiny Mon
description: Adds 56 New Shiny textures for Cobblemon!
body:
**Tired of underwhelming shiny Pokémon?**

This _resource pack_ replaces the shiny variants of _**56 Pokémon**_ with brand-new, hand-crafted shiny designs made to look cleaner, more vibrant, and more intentional than their originals.

**🧬Replaced Shiny Pokémon🧬**

Charcadet,
Armarouge,
Ceruledge,

Gastly,
Haunter,
Gengar,

Gible,
Gabite,
Garchomp,

Spearow,
Fearow,

Fomantis,
Lurantis,

Burmy, Sandy Burmy, Trash Burmy,
Wormadam, Sandy Wormadam, Trash Wormadam,

Skitty,
Delcatty,

Vulpix,
Ninetales,

Mimikyu,

Togepi,
Togetic,
Togekiss,

Pichu,
Pikachu,
Gigamax Pikachu,
Cosplay Pikachu forms,
Raichu,

Deerling,
Sawsbuck,

Diancie,
Mega Diancie,

Hoopa,
Hoopa Unbound,

Tandemaus,
Maushold,

Tinkatink, Tinkatink Dot,
Tinkatuff, Tinkatuff Dot,
Tinkaton, Tinkaton Dot,

Dragonite,
Gimmighoul,
Leafeon,
Nidoqueen


**Check out some of my other work! | Holiday Pokeballs | Cobblemon: Apex Worlds |**
